# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-06-14 by /mol:map (whole-repo scope, agent loop/loops + harness Mode refresh)._

## Inventory (layered)

molexp ships **five Python layers under `src/molexp/`** plus the application shell and the React UI. The core dependency DAG is `workspace ← workflow ← agent`, with `harness/` sitting **above** all three (`harness → agent + workflow + workspace`; the sole sanctioned `harness → agent` target is the SDK-free `agent.router.Router` Protocol, reached via `RouterBackedAgentGateway`). The FastAPI server, the Typer CLI, and registered plugins (`gh`, `submit_molq`, `tensorboard`) sit on top; the React 19 UI is downstream of the server's OpenAPI surface. A set of cross-layer primitives at the package root (`path`, `_typing`, `_logger`, `_run_display`, `entry`, `tree_monitor`, `profile/`, `git/`) plus the process-global `molexp.config` is citable from any layer.

### Module list

**Layer 0 — `src/molexp/` (cross-layer primitives, package root)**
- `molexp` (`__init__.py`) — eager re-exports `Experiment` / `GridSpace` / `Logger` / `ParamSpace` / `Path` / `Project` / `Run` / `RunContext` / `UniformSpace` / `Workspace` / `config` / `entry` / `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` for the `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins` subpackages **and** the three lazy workflow attrs `WorkflowCompiler` / `TaskContext` / `WorkflowRuntime` (`_LAZY_WORKFLOW_ATTRS`, importing `molexp.workflow` only on first access).
- `molexp._typing` — `JSONValue` and shared narrow typing aliases.
- `molexp._logger` — `Logger` (subclass of `mollog.Logger`) + `get_logger`; package-local logger factory.
- `molexp._run_display` — run-display formatting helpers (replaces the prior `_run_cancel`; cancel-helpers folded in).
- `molexp.entry` — `entry()` registry + `load_workspaces()` / `find_workflow_for_run()` / `clear_registry()` / `load_workflow_from_entrypoint()`; the script-level workflow-discovery surface.
- `molexp.path` — `Path` (subclass of `pathlib.PurePosixPath`); cross-host POSIX path primitive, no I/O.
- `molexp.tree_monitor` — re-export shim; the interactive collapsible workspace tree now lives in `cli/tui/tree_monitor.py`.
- `molexp.config` — process-global, in-code config: a live `molcfg.Config` instance defined in `molexp/__init__.py`. Register runtime values (LLM keys, `agent.model`) with molcfg-native syntax; never read from env. Server `operator_config.py` bridges `~/.molexp/config.json` into it at startup.
- `molexp.profile` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `loader.py`, `models.py`) — file-based, per-run profile config: `MolCfg` / `ProfileConfig` / `load_molcfg` / `find_default_config` / `normalize_profile_name` / `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_subprocess.py`, `operations.py`, `worktree.py`) — `ensure_clone` / `fetch` / `push` / `GitWorktreeManager`; thin async wrappers around the `git` binary.

**Layer 1 — `src/molexp/workspace/` (bottom — pure storage)**
- `molexp.workspace` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public storage surface.
- `molexp.workspace.assets` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_adapter.py`, `accessors.py`, `artifact.py`, `base.py`, `checkpoint.py`, `data.py`, `error.py`, `lineage.py`, `log.py`, `manifest.py`, `view.py`) — typed Asset hierarchy + per-scope manifest + `DataAssetLibrary`. (No standalone `execution.py` / `output.py` modules; execution-asset handling folded into `run_assets`/`error`.)
- `molexp.workspace.cache` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`) — `CacheFolder` singleton (`ws.cache`); exposes `as_cache_store()` adapter.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_sqlite.py`, `index.py`) — `AssetCatalog` (SQLite-backed) reached via `ws.catalog`; private `_sqlite.py` helper.
- `molexp.workspace.base` — atomic-JSON / atomic-text I/O (`atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`) + container-index helpers.
- `molexp.workspace._file_lock` — **NEW.** advisory inter-process file lock for `run.json` read-modify-write (server / CLI / job uncoordinated writers).
- `molexp.workspace.context` — `Context` data model.
- `molexp.workspace.errors` — workspace exception hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`).
- `molexp.workspace.execution_results` — **NEW.** read-side access to a run execution's persisted per-node outputs (the one read-only slice workspace reads out of the workflow-owned `workflow.json`).
- `molexp.workspace.experiment` — `Experiment(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.folder` — `Folder` base class (parent pointer, lazy mkdir, atomic JSON I/O, five-verb CRUD `add_folder/get_folder/has_folder/list_folders/remove_folder`, auto-derived index filenames) + `WORKSPACE_*_KIND` constants.
- `molexp.workspace.fs` — `FileSystem` `@runtime_checkable` Protocol + `PathArg` alias + `StatResult` frozen dataclass.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local` — `LocalFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote` — `RemoteFileSystem` wrapping `molq.transport.Transport`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_cached` — `CachingFileSystem` decorator + `prefetch_workspace_indices`; server-side lazy-download mirror.
- `molexp.workspace.metrics` — run-local JSONL metrics.
- `molexp.workspace.models` — `FolderMetadata` (base) + `WorkspaceMetadata` / `ProjectMetadata` / `ExperimentMetadata` / `RunMetadata` / `ExecutionRecord` / `ComputeTarget` / `ErrorInfo`.
- `molexp.workspace.param` — `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` / `Params`.
- `molexp.workspace.project` — `Project(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.run` — `Run(Folder)` + `RunStatus` + `RETRYABLE_STATUSES` / `Run.is_retryable` (the single retryable-domain source of truth) + `RunContext` re-export.
- `molexp.workspace.runcontext` — **NEW (renamed from `run`-inlined).** `RunContext` manager (`with run.start() as ctx:`); orchestrates lifecycle + result + asset I/O. Decomposed into four tiered collaborators:
  - `run_lifecycle.py` — **NEW.** `RunLifecycle` (Tier-1 enter/exit state machine).
  - `run_execution.py` — **NEW.** `ExecutionStore` (Tier-2 execution-attempt persistence).
  - `run_context.py` — **NEW.** `ContextStore` (Tier-2 `run.json` context-blob persistence).
  - `run_assets.py` — **NEW.** `RunAssets` (Tier-3 working-dir + asset-I/O facade).
- `molexp.workspace.schema_version` — JSON-schema version constant + load/upgrade helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.target` — `Target` sum (`LocalTarget` / `RemoteTarget`), `parse_target` / `resolve_target` / `target_to_transport` / `target_to_filesystem`, `Session` / `SessionManager`, `TargetNotFound` / `TargetNeedsResolution`.
- `molexp.workspace.targets` — compute-target registry helpers backed by `WorkspaceMetadata.targets`.
- `molexp.workspace.utils` — `slugify`, `compute_content_hash`, helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.workspace` — `Workspace(Folder)` + `set_cli_root_override`; `__init__` reads metadata only, writes its root lazily via `materialize()`.

**Layer 2 — `src/molexp/workflow/` (middle — graph engine)**
- `molexp.workflow` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports the public OOP API.
- `molexp.workflow._graph_decl` — internal task-registration declarations.
- `molexp.workflow._helpers` — `_callable_name` / `_stable_workflow_id` / `_to_snake_case`.
- `molexp.workflow._names` — `generate_name`.
- `molexp.workflow.binding` — `WorkflowBinding` / `WorkflowBindingRegistry` / `default_binding_registry`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache` — `Caching` LRU + `CacheEntry` + `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache_store` — `CacheStore` Protocol + `FileCacheStore`. (Cache-identity contract unchanged: node key = `f(snapshot.key, inputs_hash)`; the `inputs_hash` term lives at the `Caching` seam, not inside `TaskSnapshot.key`.)
- `molexp.workflow.command_task` — **NEW.** `CommandTask` reusable batch `Task` (runs one external command, fails on nonzero return).
- `molexp.workflow.context` — `TaskContext` + `ActorContext`.
- `molexp.workflow.contract` — `WorkflowContract` / `TaskIO` / `TaskInputSpec` / `TaskOutputSpec` / `ArtifactDecl` / `ValidationCheck` / `ValidationCheckId` / `ValidationIssue` / `ValidationReport` / `Severity` / `default_validation_checks` / `validate_workflow_contract`.
- `molexp.workflow.promote` — `promote_callable` / `resolve_callable_entrypoint` / `resolve_spec_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.workflow.protocols` — `Runnable` / `Streamable` Protocols.
- `molexp.workflow.registry` — `TaskTypeRegistry` + `default_registry`.
- `molexp.workflow.compiler` — `WorkflowCompiler` (mutable; decorator + OOP) → `.compile()` → `CompiledWorkflow`.
- `molexp.workflow.compiled` — `CompiledWorkflow` (frozen, content-hashed graph artifact) + `.subgraph()`.
- `molexp.workflow.codec` — `WorkflowCodec` / `default_codec`.
- `molexp.workflow.ir` — `WorkflowGraphIR` + `GraphTaskIR` / `GraphEdgeIR` / `GraphLoopIR` / `GraphParallelIR` / `GraphNodePosition` / `EdgeKind` + `build_workflow_graph_ir`.
- `molexp.workflow.materialization_store` — **NEW.** engine-side materialization for the pure-task-context contract (referentially-transparent `execute(inputs, config) -> output` persistence).
- `molexp.workflow.mermaid` — `render_workflow_mermaid`.
- `molexp.workflow.subworkflow` — **NEW.** `SubWorkflow` — the sanctioned sub-workflow composition node (inner runs execute with persistence off).
- `molexp.workflow.sweep` — `SweepMap`.
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot` — `TaskSnapshot` (AST-normalized identity).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot_ref` — `WorkflowSnapshotRef`.
- `molexp.workflow.task` — `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC` base classes.
- `molexp.workflow.types` — `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` re-export, edge sum types, error hierarchy (incl. `WorkflowDeadlockError`), IR-internal `Next`.
- `molexp.workflow.version` — `WorkflowVersion` / `TaskTopologyEntry` / `WorkflowVersionConflictError`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private subpackage; sole `import pydantic_graph` site — surviving pg surface is the `End` re-export): `_graph_analysis.py`, `compiler.py` (`WorkflowGraphCompiler`), `plan.py` (`ExecutionPlan` + `START`), `engine.py` (`run_plan` — values-on-edges scheduler, structural deadlock detection), `node.py` / `node_cache.py` / `node_params.py` (task-body execution + context build, cache + param resolution), `persistence.py` (`write_initial_workflow_json` / `mark_task_status`), `runtime.py` (`WorkflowRuntime`, `make_execution_id`), `state.py` (`WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`).

**Layer 3 — `src/molexp/agent/` (pydantic-ai facade + LLM-only loops; sibling of workflow, below harness)**

The agent layer is a **thin pydantic-ai facade** plus two LLM-only **loops**. The agent-layer LLM-conversation concept is now spelled **`AgentLoop`** (not `AgentMode`); **"Mode" is reserved for `molexp.harness.Mode` orchestration.** Pipeline orchestration (Plan / Run) lives in `molexp.harness`.

- `molexp.agent` (`__init__.py`) — public surface: `AgentLoop`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentRunner`, `AgentRuntime`, `AgentSession` (re-export of `agent.session.Session`); `PydanticAIRouter` served lazily via `__getattr__` (not in `__all__`).
- `molexp.agent.loop` — `AgentLoop` ABC (abstract `async def run(*, runtime, sink, user_input) -> None`) + `AgentRunResult` value type + `resume`.
- `molexp.agent.runner` — `AgentRunner` + `AgentRunnerConfigError`; lazy `PydanticAIRouter`, per-run `AgentRuntime`. Surfaces `run()` / `run_events()`.
- `molexp.agent.runtime` — `AgentRuntime` frozen dataclass: bundles `session` / `router` / `execution_env` / `hooks`.
- `molexp.agent.router` — `Router` Protocol + `ModelTier` enum + `RouterTextResult` + `TierModels` + `AgenticChunk` discriminated union (`TextDeltaChunk` / `ToolCallChunk` / `ToolResultChunk` / `FinalChunk`). **This is the one module harness is allowed to import.**
- `molexp.agent.events` — `AgentEvent` discriminated union + `AsyncIteratorEventSink` (queue-backed `EventSink` + `AsyncIterator[AgentEvent]`).
- `molexp.agent.session` / `session_storage` / `session_entry` — `Session` (append-only entry-tree + leaf pointer), `SessionStorage` Protocol + `JsonlSessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage`, the `SessionEntry` union.
- `molexp.agent.compaction` — `CompactionSettings` / `CompactionPlan` / `prepare_compaction` / `estimate_tokens`.
- `molexp.agent.execution_env` — `ExecutionEnv` Protocol + `LocalExecutionEnv` + `ExecResult` / `ExecutionError`.
- `molexp.agent.folders` — `Agent(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.agent"`) + `AgentSession(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.session"`), distinct from the runtime `Session` re-exported at package root.
- `molexp.agent.folders_metadata` — `AgentMetadata` / `AgentSessionMetadata`.
- `molexp.agent.types` — `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal` / `GoalMode`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.loops` (subpackage) — **two** loops only (`__init__.py` exports `ChatLoop` / `ChatLoopConfig` / `InteractiveLoop` / `InteractiveLoopConfig`):
  - `chat.py` — `ChatLoop` / `ChatLoopConfig` (one LLM round-trip → terminal completion event).
  - `_compact.py` — shared compaction helper.
  - `interactive/{loop.py, tools.py, __init__.py}` — `InteractiveLoop` / `InteractiveLoopConfig` (emergent CLI-default loop; drives `Router.stream_agentic`, forwards each `AgenticChunk`); `tools.py` ships read-only `read_file` / `list_directory` / `search_code` callables.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private — sole `import pydantic_ai` site; `__all__ = []`): `router.py` (`PydanticAIRouter`), `mcp.py`, `messages_codec.py`, `errors.py` (`ProviderError`), `events.py`, `retry.py`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `defaults.py`, `oauth.py`, `store.py`) — MCP config layer.
- `molexp.agent.persistence` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `router.py`, `tiered.py`) — `TieredResourceStore` / `ResourceSpec` / `Scope` / `tiered_router_factory`.

**Layer 4 — `src/molexp/harness/` (lineage-first experiment orchestrator — top; sibling-above of agent/workflow/workspace)**

Top-level package. Dependency direction `harness → workspace + workflow + agent`, the single sanctioned `harness → agent` target being `molexp.agent.router` (SDK-free Router Protocol, via `RouterBackedAgentGateway`). **MUST NOT be imported by** workspace / workflow / agent / plugins / server / cli; `pydantic_ai` / `pydantic_graph` must not be transitively pulled in. Two canonical **Mode** pipelines ship (`PlanMode`, `RunMode`); the engine never loads in the harness process (pytest + materialized `run_workflow.py` run as executor subprocesses). Production entry point is `molexp plan [--execute]`.

- `molexp.harness` (`__init__.py`) — package root; re-exports the public surface enumerated below.
- `molexp.harness.mode` — **NEW.** `Mode` ABC (stages-as-ledger orchestrator; `_LedgerEntry`; resume/skip completed stages on the same content-addressed Run).
- `molexp.harness.modes/` — **NEW.** the two canonical pipelines (`__init__` exports `PlanMode` / `RunMode`):
  - `plan.py` — `PlanMode` (9 stages: `SaveUserPlan → GenerateExperimentReport → ExtractWorkflowIR → ValidateWorkflowIR → BindMolcraftsTasks → ValidateBoundWorkflow → GenerateWorkflowSource → ValidateWorkflowSource → ApprovalGate`).
  - `run.py` — `RunMode(executor=…)` (10 stages, defaults to `LocalExecutor`: `GenerateTestSpec → ValidateTestSpec → GenerateTestCode → ValidateTestSource → MaterializeExecution → ExecuteTests → ExecuteWorkflow → GenerateFinalReport → ApprovalGate → GenerateAuditReport`).
- `molexp.harness.errors` — `HarnessError` base + `AgentResponseNotRegisteredError`, `ArtifactNotFoundError`, `CapabilityAlreadyRegisteredError`, `CapabilityCallValidationError`, `CapabilityNotFoundError`, `EventSeqConflictError`, `StageExecutionError`, `StagePersistedFailureError`.
- `molexp.harness.core/` — stage execution core: `run_context.py` (`HarnessRunContext`), `stage.py` (`Stage` ABC, `async run(ctx) -> ArtifactRef`), `stage_runner.py` (`StageRunner` — wraps stages with `stage_started` / `artifact_created` / `stage_completed` events + auto-wired `derived_from` lineage), `fingerprint.py` (**NEW** content-addressed Run fingerprint).
- `molexp.harness.gateways/` — agent gateway contract + impls: `gateway.py` (`AgentGateway` Protocol), `stub.py` (`StubAgentGateway` — not re-exported), `router_backed.py` (**NEW** `RouterBackedAgentGateway` — production impl driven by `agent.router.Router`).
- `molexp.harness.prompts/` — **NEW.** system prompts for the LLM-driven stages (`bound_workflow`, `experiment_report`, `final_report`, `test_code`, `test_spec`, `workflow_ir`, `workflow_source`) + `prompts_by_agent()` map.
- `molexp.harness.audit/` — `generate.py` (`generate_audit_report`), `replay.py` (`find_last_successful_stage` / `replay_metadata`).
- `molexp.harness.executors/` — `executor.py` (`Executor` Protocol), `dry_run.py` (`DryRunExecutor`), `local.py` (`LocalExecutor`).
- `molexp.harness.policy/` — `evaluate.py` (`evaluate_approval_policy`, `make_final_report_approval_request`, `auto_grant_approver`), `event_log.py` (`record_approval_request` / `record_approval_decision`).
- `molexp.harness.registry/` — `capability_registry.py` (`CapabilityRegistry` Protocol), `in_memory.py` (`InMemoryCapabilityRegistry`).
- `molexp.harness.schemas/` — frozen pydantic data models (`frozen=True`; `Literal[…]` discriminators): `agent_call`, `approval`, `artifact`, `audit_report`, `bound_workflow`, `capability`, `command`, `event`, `execution_result` (**NEW** `ExecutionResult`), `experiment_report`, `final_report` (**NEW** `FinalReport`), `mode_result` (**NEW** `ModeResult`), `parameter`, `policy`, `test_source` (**NEW** `TestSource`), `test_spec`, `user_plan`, `validation`, `workflow_ir`, `workflow_source` (**NEW** `WorkflowSource`).
- `molexp.harness.stages/` — concrete `Stage` subclasses for both pipelines: `_resolve.py` (helper), PlanMode set (`save_user_plan`, `generate_experiment_report`, `extract_workflow_ir`, `validate_workflow_ir`, `bind_molcrafts_tasks`, `validate_bound_workflow`, `generate_workflow_source`, `validate_workflow_source`, `approval_gate`) + RunMode set (**NEW**: `generate_test_spec`, `validate_test_spec`, `generate_test_code`, `validate_test_source`, `materialize_execution`, `execute_tests`, `execute_workflow`, `generate_final_report`, `generate_audit_report`).
- `molexp.harness.store/` — Protocol + impl pairs: `artifact_store.py` (`ArtifactStore`), `file_artifact_store.py` (`FileArtifactStore`), `event_log.py` (`EventLog`), `sqlite_event_log.py` (`SQLiteEventLog`), `lineage_store.py` (`ArtifactLineageStore`), `sqlite_lineage_store.py` (`SQLiteArtifactLineageStore`), private `_sqlite.py`.
- `molexp.harness.validators/` — pure structural validators (sync, deterministic, return `ValidationReport`, never raise): `workflow_ir.py`, `bound_workflow.py`, `test_spec.py`, `test_source.py` (**NEW**), `workflow_source.py` (**NEW**), `provenance.py`.

**Layer 5 — `src/molexp/server/` (FastAPI app)**
- `molexp.server` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app` — `create_app()` factory, lifespan, bundled-UI discovery, dev CORS.
- `molexp.server.dependencies` — top-level DI facade (`Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`, `assert_served_workspace`, `assert_workspace_writable`).
- `molexp.server.deps/` — **NEW** decomposed DI subpackage: `agent_runtime.py` (`get_agent_runtime` / `reset_agent_runtime`), `config.py` (`Settings`, `get_settings`), `folder_store.py`, `resolution.py`, `served.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_state.py`.
- `molexp.server.agent_runtime/` — **NEW** server-side agent session runtime: `registry.py` (`AgentSessionRegistry`), `runtime.py` (`AgentSessionRuntime`), `turn.py` (`AgentTurn`), `serialize.py`.
- `molexp.server.operator_config` — **NEW (charter-named).** `OPERATOR_CONFIG_PATH` (`~/.molexp/config.json`) + `AGENT_MODEL_KEY = "agent.model"` loader; bridges the operator config into the process-global `molexp.config` at startup (CLI and server share one loader).
- `molexp.server.preview` + `molexp.server.routes.preview` — **NEW.** file-preview support.
- `molexp.server.exceptions` — typed HTTP exception classes.
- `molexp.server.handlers` — workspace-error → HTTP envelope translation.
- `molexp.server.manager` — `ServerManager` lifecycle.
- `molexp.server.workspace_targets` — `WorkspaceTarget` registry persisted at `~/.molexp/workspace_targets.json` via `workspace.atomic_write_json` + `target_to_filesystem_for_workspace_target`.
- `molexp.server.routes` (subpackage, `create_api_router()`) — `agent.py`, `agent_admin.py`, `agent_task_store.py`, `agent_tasks.py`, `asset.py`, `catalog.py`, `execution.py`, `experiment.py`, `molq.py`, `preview.py` (**NEW**), `project.py`, `registry.py`, `run.py`, `targets.py`, `tensorboard.py`, `workflow.py` (**NEW**), `workspace.py`, `workspaces.py` (**NEW** — workspace-target registry routes), `_scope.py`. (No `review_store.py` / `reviews.py` — review routes removed.)
- `molexp.server.schemas` (subpackage) — `requests.py`, `responses.py`, `molq.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_runs.py`, `workspace_targets.py`.

**Layer 6 — `src/molexp/cli/` (Typer CLI — flat command tree)**
- `molexp.cli` (`__init__.py`) — assembles the flat tree: imports `app` from `cli/_app.py`, side-effect-registers verb modules (`catalog`, `explore`, `lifecycle`, `monitor`, `run`, `serve`, `sync` from `cli.workspace`), top-level commands `init` / `agent` / `plan`, and the typer groups `project` / `experiment` / `runs` / `asset` / `target` / `mcp` / `session` / `config`. Third-party plugin discovery via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli._app` — **NEW.** the shared Typer `app` instance (verbs self-register on it via `@app.command`).
- `molexp.cli.__main__` — entrypoint shim.
- `molexp.cli._common` — shared rich console + `rprint` + `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` + `deterministic_run_id` + `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli._target` — **NEW.** shared `-t/--target` option resolution.
- `molexp.cli.agent_cmd` — `molexp agent` interactive REPL on top of `InteractiveLoop`; drives `AgentRunner.run_events()` → `AgentEventRenderer`; deferred `molexp.agent` imports.
- `molexp.cli.agent_render` — `AgentEventRenderer` (Rich terminal renderer for the typed `AgentEvent` stream).
- `molexp.cli.plan_cmd` — **NEW.** `molexp plan [--execute]` — drives harness `PlanMode` (and with `--execute`, chains `RunMode`) against a content-addressed Run; injects gateway + executor.
- `molexp.cli.config_cmd` — `config_app` (read/write `~/.molexp/config.json`).
- `molexp.cli.init_cmd` — `molexp init [PATH]`.
- `molexp.cli.prune` — `register(run_app)` adds `prune` to the `runs` group.
- `molexp.cli.session_cmd` — `session_app`.
- `molexp.cli.target_cmd` — `target_app`.
- `molexp.cli.tui/` — **NEW.** terminal-UI subpackage (moved out of package root): `rendering.py`, `run_monitor.py` (`RunMonitor`), `tree_model.py`, `tree_monitor.py` (`TreeMonitor`).
- `molexp.cli.workspace` (subpackage) — workspace command implementations (commands self-register on the top-level `app`, no per-package `workspace_app`):
  - `__init__.py` — module-import side effects + remote-target guard.
  - `catalog.py` — **NEW.** catalog subcommand.
  - `explore.py` — `explore` (delegates to `cli/tui/tree_monitor`).
  - `lifecycle.py` — `init` / `info` / `materialize`.
  - `mcp_config.py` — **NEW.** `mcp_app` group.
  - `monitor.py` — `monitor` / `watch`.
  - `resources.py` — `project_app` / `experiment_app` / `run_app` / `asset_app` resource CRUD.
  - `run.py` — `run` subcommand (script-driven workflow execution).
  - `serve.py` — `serve` (FastAPI + bundled UI).
  - `sync.py` — `sync` / `exec` / `shell`. (No standalone `interactive.py` REPL module.)

**Layer 7 — `src/molexp/plugins/` (registered plugin packages)**
- `molexp.plugins` (`__init__.py`) — `Capability` enum, `PluginRegistry`, `CapabilityNotAvailable`, lazy GH loader, re-exports `CliPlugin` / `discover_cli_plugins` / `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli` — `CliPlugin` + `discover_cli_plugins()` + `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui` — `discover_ui_plugin_dirs()` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `client.py`, `models.py`, `queries.py`) — `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, GraphQL/REST models.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `cancel.py` (**NEW**), `dashboard.py`, `metadata.py`, `spec.py`, `staging.py`, `submit.py`) — molq scheduler submission + Remote Operations dashboard data source + job cancel.
- `molexp.plugins.tensorboard` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `parser.py`; optional, `pip install molexp[tensorboard]`) — `ScalarPoint` / `ScalarSeries` / `discover_logdirs` / `read_scalars` / `require_tensorboard`.

**Layer 8 — `ui/src/` (React 19 frontend — package-level summary)**
- React 19 SPA downstream of the server's OpenAPI surface. Primary surface = the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`ui/src/api/generated/`, regenerated via `npm run generate:api`, never hand-edited). Hand-written modules: `app/` (registry → renderer map, layout, panels, renderers, runs dashboard, settings, Zustand `state/`), `components/` (shared + shadcn primitives + charts), `lib/`, `plugins/` (bundled `core` / `metrics` / `molq` / `molvis` / `tensorboard` runtime), `mocks/` (MSW), `styles/`, `types/`. Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Public surface

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- `molexp` (top-level `__all__`): `Experiment`, `GridSpace`, `Logger`, `ParamSpace`, `Path`, `Project`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `TaskContext`, `UniformSpace`, `WorkflowCompiler`, `WorkflowRuntime`, `Workspace`, `config`, `entry`, `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins` + the three workflow attrs.
- `molexp.path`: `Path` (PurePosixPath subclass).
- `molexp._logger`: `Logger`, `get_logger`.
- `molexp.entry`: `entry`, `load_workspaces`, `find_workflow_for_run`, `clear_registry`, `load_workflow_from_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.config`: the process-global `molcfg.Config` instance (LLM keys, `agent.model`).
- `molexp.profile`: `MolCfg`, `ProfileConfig`, `load_molcfg`, `find_default_config`, `normalize_profile_name`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git`: `ensure_clone`, `fetch`, `push`, `GitWorktreeManager`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- `molexp.workspace` re-exports: `Folder`, `FolderMetadata`, `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `RETRYABLE_STATUSES`, `Context`, `Params`, `ParamSpace`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, the `*Metadata` models, `ExecutionRecord`, `ComputeTarget`, `ErrorInfo`, the Asset family + `DataAssetLibrary` + `AssetCatalog` + `AssetsView` + `AssetScope` + `AssetManifest`, `CacheFolder`, `LocalTarget`, `RemoteTarget`, `Target`, `TargetNotFound`, `Session`, `SessionManager`, folder-kind constants, the typed error hierarchy, target helpers, compute-target helpers, atomic I/O (`atomic_write_json`, `atomic_write_text`).
- `molexp.workspace.fs`: `FileSystem` Protocol, `PathArg`, `StatResult`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local` / `fs_remote` / `fs_cached`: `LocalFileSystem` / `RemoteFileSystem` / (`CachingFileSystem`, `prefetch_workspace_indices`).
- `molexp.workspace.execution_results`: read-side per-node execution-output accessors.
- `molexp.workspace.run`: `Run`, `RunStatus`, `RETRYABLE_STATUSES`, `RunContext`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- `molexp.workflow.__all__` adds `CommandTask` and `SubWorkflow` to the prior set (`WorkflowCompiler`, `CompiledWorkflow`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End`, `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `WorkflowBinding`, `WorkflowBindingRegistry`, `default_binding_registry`, `WorkflowCodec`, `default_codec`, `WorkflowRuntime`, `Caching`, `CacheStore`, `FileCacheStore`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `make_execution_id`, `promote_callable`, `resolve_callable_entrypoint`, `resolve_spec_entrypoint`, `generate_name`, the IR types, `render_workflow_mermaid`, `SweepMap`, the contract types, the edge sum types, the versioning types, the error hierarchy incl. `WorkflowDeadlockError`).
- `Next` deliberately NOT in `__all__`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private): `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `WorkflowRuntime`, `WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`, `write_initial_workflow_json`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- `molexp.agent.__all__`: `AgentLoop`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentRunner`, `AgentRuntime`, `AgentSession` (re-export of `agent.session.Session`). `PydanticAIRouter` served lazily via `__getattr__`, not in `__all__`.
- `molexp.agent.loops`: `ChatLoop` / `ChatLoopConfig`, `InteractiveLoop` / `InteractiveLoopConfig`.
- `molexp.agent.router`: `Router` Protocol, `ModelTier`, `TierModels`, `RouterTextResult`, `AgenticChunk` union (the sole harness-visible agent module).
- `molexp.agent.events`: `AgentEvent` union + members, `AsyncIteratorEventSink`, `EventSink`.
- `molexp.agent.session` / `session_storage` / `session_entry`: `Session`, `SessionStorage` / `JsonlSessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage`, the `SessionEntry` union.
- `molexp.agent.execution_env`: `ExecutionEnv`, `LocalExecutionEnv`, `ExecResult`, `ExecutionError`.
- `molexp.agent.folders`: `Agent`, `AgentSession` (Folder subclass), kind + filename constants.
- `molexp.agent.types`: `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp`: MCP store / OAuth / defaults surface.
- `molexp.agent.persistence`: `TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private, `__all__ = []`): `PydanticAIRouter`, `build_mcp_server`, `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`, `ProviderError` — dotted-path only.

**Layer 4 — harness**
- `molexp.harness.__all__` (per source): `WELL_KNOWN_ARTIFACT_KINDS`, `AgentCallResult`, `AgentCallSpec`, `AgentGateway`, `AgentResponseNotRegisteredError`, `ApprovalDecision`, `ApprovalGate`, `ApprovalIntent`, `ApprovalPolicy`, `ApprovalRequest`, `Approver`, `ArtifactKind`, `ArtifactLineageStore`, `ArtifactNotFoundError`, `ArtifactRef`, `ArtifactStore`, `AuditReport`, `BindMolcraftsTasks`, `BoundTask`, `BoundWorkflow`, `CapabilityAlreadyRegisteredError`, `CapabilityCallValidationError`, `CapabilityNotFoundError`, `CapabilityRegistry`, `CommandResult`, `CommandSpec`, `DependencyEdge`, `DryRunExecutor`, `EventLog`, `EventSeqConflictError`, `EventType`, `ExecuteTests`, `ExecuteWorkflow`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `ExecutionResult`, `Executor`, `ExpectedOutput`, `ExperimentReport`, `ExtractWorkflowIR`, `FileArtifactStore`, `FinalReport`, `GenerateAuditReport`, `GenerateExperimentReport`, `GenerateFinalReport`, `GenerateTestCode`, `GenerateTestSpec`, `GenerateWorkflowSource`, `HarnessError`, `HarnessEvent`, `HarnessRunContext`, `InMemoryCapabilityRegistry`, `LocalExecutor`, `MaterializeExecution`, `Mode`, `ModeResult`, `ParameterSource`, `ParameterValue`, `PathPolicy`, `PlanMode`, `ResourcePolicy`, `RouterBackedAgentGateway`, `RunMode`, `SQLiteArtifactLineageStore`, `SQLiteEventLog`, `SaveUserPlan`, `Stage`, `StageExecutionError`, `StagePersistedFailureError`, `StageRunner`, `TaskIR`, `TestKind`, `TestResult`, `TestSource`, `TestSpec`, `TestStatus`, `ToolCapability`, `ToolPolicy`, `UserPlan`, `ValidateBoundWorkflow`, `ValidateTestSource`, `ValidateTestSpec`, `ValidateWorkflowIR`, `ValidateWorkflowSource`, `ValidationReport`, `ValidationViolation`, `WorkflowIR`, `WorkflowSource`, `auto_grant_approver`, `evaluate_approval_policy`, `find_last_successful_stage`, `generate_audit_report`, `make_final_report_approval_request`, `record_approval_decision`, `record_approval_request`, `replay_metadata`, `validate_bound_workflow`, `validate_provenance`, `validate_test_source`, `validate_test_spec`, `validate_workflow_ir`, `validate_workflow_source`.
- Notable non-re-export: `StubAgentGateway` is intentionally hidden — production sees only the `AgentGateway` Protocol + `RouterBackedAgentGateway`.

**Layer 5 — server**
- `molexp.server`: `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app`: `create_app`, `lifespan`.
- `molexp.server.dependencies`: `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`, `assert_served_workspace`, `assert_workspace_writable`.
- `molexp.server.deps`: `get_agent_runtime` / `reset_agent_runtime`, `Settings` / `get_settings`, folder-store / resolution / served / targets / workspace-state DI providers.
- `molexp.server.agent_runtime`: `AgentSessionRegistry`, `AgentSessionRuntime`, `AgentTurn`.
- `molexp.server.operator_config`: `OPERATOR_CONFIG_PATH`, `AGENT_MODEL_KEY`, the loader/bridge.
- `molexp.server.workspace_targets`: `WorkspaceTarget` registry + `target_to_filesystem_for_workspace_target`.
- `molexp.server.routes`: `create_api_router` + per-domain routers (`agent` / `agent_admin` / `agent_tasks`, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `preview`, `project`, `registry`, `run`, `targets`, `tensorboard`, `workflow`, `workspace`, `workspaces`).
- `molexp.server.schemas`: `*Request` / `*Response` models, the molq overview, workspace-runs aggregate, `workspace_targets`, the TensorBoard scalar response models.

**Layer 6 — cli**
- `molexp.cli`: `app` (Typer). Top-level commands: `init`, `agent` (REPL), `plan` (`--execute`), the workspace verbs (`info` / `materialize` / `serve` / `sync` / `exec` / `shell` / `explore` / `monitor` / `watch` / `run` / `catalog`); typer groups `project` / `experiment` / `runs` (incl. `prune`) / `asset` / `target` / `mcp` / `session` / `config`. Third-party plugins via `molexp.cli_plugins`.
- `molexp.cli._app`: the shared `app`.
- `molexp.cli._common`: `console`, `rprint`, `_TERMINAL_STATUSES`, `deterministic_run_id`, `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.agent_cmd` / `agent_render`: `agent` command + `AgentEventRenderer`.
- `molexp.cli.plan_cmd`: `plan` command.
- `molexp.cli.tui`: `RunMonitor`, `TreeMonitor`, tree-model types.
- `molexp.cli.workspace`: per-file verbs self-registered on `app`; `resources.py` exports `project_app` / `experiment_app` / `run_app` / `asset_app`; `mcp_config.py` exports `mcp_app`.

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- `molexp.plugins`: `Capability` (`GH`), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry`, `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli`: `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui`: `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh`: `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, `Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq`: scheduler submission helpers; submodules `submit`, `metadata`, `spec`, `dashboard`, `staging`, `cancel`.
- `molexp.plugins.tensorboard` (optional via `pip install molexp[tensorboard]`): `ScalarPoint`, `ScalarSeries`, `discover_logdirs`, `read_scalars`, `require_tensorboard`.

**Layer 8 — ui**
- TypeScript ESM exports — primary surface is the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`api/generated/`). Hand-written modules export per-file React components, Zustand store hooks, `registerRenderers()`, MSW handler arrays, the contribution-registry runtime, and bundled-plugin entrypoints. Public registration points: `app/registry.ts`, `app/renderers/registerRenderers.ts`, `plugins/runtime.ts`, `mocks/handlers/`.

### Style summary

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- naming: snake_case modules; underscore prefix (`_logger`, `_run_display`, `_typing`) marks shared infra not in the public surface.
- construction: pure data + thin helpers; no I/O at import; lazy `__getattr__` defers heavy subpackages and the three workflow attrs.
- error handling: structured warning-returns over raising for missing molq job ids.
- import discipline: `Path` is pure path arithmetic; the stdlib filesystem `Path` is reached only through `workspace.fs_local`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- naming: `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` functions; `*Metadata` pydantic models for on-disk shapes; `*Asset` for typed asset variants; `*ExistsError` / `*NotFoundError` for typed exceptions; `Folder` subclasses live alongside their entity module; `RunContext` decomposed into Tier-1/2/3 collaborators (`RunLifecycle` / `ExecutionStore` / `ContextStore` / `RunAssets`).
- construction: pure-data types are `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)`; runtime entities are `Folder` subclasses with explicit `__init__`; child factories idempotent + lazy — no disk *writes* in `__init__`; `Workspace.__init__` only reads, root write deferred to `materialize()`.
- error handling: typed exceptions carry the entity id; atomic JSON via temp-file + `os.replace`; advisory `_file_lock` guards uncoordinated `run.json` writers; `RETRYABLE_STATUSES` / `Run.is_retryable` is the single retryable-domain source of truth.
- import discipline: **every I/O routes through `self._fs`** (`FileSystem` Protocol) — `LocalFileSystem` / `RemoteFileSystem` / `CachingFileSystem`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- naming: compiler/compiled separation (`WorkflowCompiler` → `CompiledWorkflow`); error class names `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types `<Noun>Edges`; reusable nodes `CommandTask` / `SubWorkflow`.
- construction: value types `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; `WorkflowExecution` plain (live asyncio state); `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC`; `_pydantic_graph/` is the sole `@dataclass` subtree.
- error handling: `WorkflowError` hierarchy at compile time; `ParallelExecutionError` aggregates; cache `read` corruption logged + entry deleted; deadlock structural (`WorkflowDeadlockError`).
- import discipline: `pydantic_graph` only under `_pydantic_graph/`; `Next` deliberately not in `__all__`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- naming: `AgentLoop` ABC + concrete `<Verb>Loop` + paired `<Verb>LoopConfig` under `loops/`; the agent-layer LLM concept is **"Loop"**, **"Mode" is reserved for harness**. Pure data under `types.py`; pydantic-ai firewall under `_pydanticai/`. `InteractiveLoop` is the one emergent loop (drives `Router.stream_agentic`); `ChatLoop` is one round-trip.
- construction: `AgentRunner(loop=, model=/models=/router=)` with exactly-one-of validation (`AgentRunnerConfigError`); `PydanticAIRouter` built lazily / per-run. Pure data is `BaseModel(frozen=True)` — `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` **forbidden** here; runtime containers (`Session`, `LocalExecutionEnv`, storage impls, `AgentRunner`, `AgentRuntime`) are plain classes.
- loop contract: `AgentLoop.run(*, runtime, sink, user_input) -> None` is async; events flow through the injected `AsyncIteratorEventSink`.
- error handling: typed `AgentFailure` / `FailureKind`; `ExecutionError` is the subprocess boundary; `_pydanticai.errors.ProviderError` the single SDK-failure boundary.
- import discipline: `import molexp.agent` loads neither SDK; `pydantic_graph` **never** under `agent/`; only `agent/_pydanticai/*.py` may `import pydantic_ai`; agent **MUST NOT** import `molexp.workflow` or `molexp.harness`.

**Layer 4 — harness**
- naming: schemas under `schemas/` are `frozen=True` pydantic with `Literal[…]` discriminator aliases; Protocol + concrete-impl pairs under `store/`, `executors/`, `registry/`; validators in `validators/` are sync, deterministic, return `ValidationReport`, **never raise** (stages own the report-to-error lift); concrete `Stage` subclasses are PascalCase verbs; **`Mode` orchestrates a stage ledger** (resume/skip completed stages on the same content-addressed Run).
- construction: `Stage.run(ctx)` returns one `ArtifactRef`; `StageRunner` brackets events + auto-wires `derived_from` lineage; `Mode.stages(user_input)` returns the ordered `Stage` list; `RunMode(executor=…)` defaults to `LocalExecutor` (inject `DryRunExecutor` for a dry run); pytest + materialized `run_workflow.py` run as executor subprocesses so the workflow engine never loads in-process. SQLite stores share private `_sqlite.py`, enforce `UNIQUE(run_id, seq)`.
- error handling: `HarnessError` base + granular subclasses; `auto_grant_approver` is the non-interactive approval shortcut.
- import discipline: **`harness → workspace + workflow + agent`** with the single agent target `agent.router.Router`; atomic writes via `workspace.atomic_write_json`; hashing via `workspace.utils.compute_content_hash`. Does **not** import `plugins` / `server` / `cli`; `pydantic_ai` / `pydantic_graph` never transitively loaded by `import molexp.harness`.

**Layer 5 — server**
- naming: route modules named after the domain entity; request schemas `*Request`, response schemas `*Response`; per-domain `APIRouter` aggregated by `create_api_router()`; DI providers decomposed under `deps/`.
- construction: routes via `include_router` (workspace-scoped routes wrapped by `_create_workspace_scoped_router`); DI through `Depends(...)`; lifespan async CM; CORS in dev; bundled-UI mount in prod; `operator_config.py` bridges `~/.molexp/config.json` (`agent.model`) into `molexp.config` at startup; `agent_runtime/` holds the server-side agent session runtime.
- error handling: typed exceptions mapped to JSON envelopes by `handlers.register_exception_handlers`; bundled-frontend lookup falls back gracefully; the TensorBoard route lazily imports its parser (503 + install hint only on request).

**Layer 6 — cli**
- naming: flat command tree — verb modules self-register on the shared `app` (`cli/_app.py`) via `@app.command`; typer groups attached with `add_typer`; terminal-UI lives under `cli/tui/`.
- construction: `agent_cmd` / `plan_cmd` defer heavy imports into the command body so `molexp --help` stays fast; `agent_render` lives in the CLI on purpose (the agent library never imports `rich`).
- error handling: per-plugin `try / except Exception` with `logger.warning`; `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` for non-cancellable run states.

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- naming: subpackage names `<category>_<implementation>` (`submit_molq`); one subpackage per `Capability`; `gh.client.GitHubClient` is async-only.
- construction: capability lazy loader; `PluginRegistry` caches success/failure per `Capability`; `CliPlugin` frozen `__slots__` with `register: Callable[[typer.Typer], None]`; `tensorboard` ships a thin tfevents → typed-Python parser behind `require_tensorboard()`.
- error handling: every entry-point load wrapped in `_safe_load` / `_safe_resolve`; mismatches/duplicates warned + skipped; `CapabilityNotAvailable` carries `_INSTALL_HINTS`.

**Layer 8 — ui**
- naming: PascalCase components, camelCase hooks, kebab-case routes; bundled plugins under `plugins/<id>/index.ts`.
- construction: React 19 + Rsbuild; renderers registered via `registerRenderers.ts` keyed by entity-type strings; OpenAPI client regenerated by `npm run generate:api` (never hand-edit `api/generated/`); MSW handlers mirror server route domains.
- error handling: panels render fallbacks; UI-plugin loader logs + skips broken bundles; OAuth callback surfaces backend errors verbatim.

### Layer roles

- `molexp.path` / `molexp._typing` / `molexp._logger` / `molexp.entry` / `molexp._run_display` / `molexp.tree_monitor` / `molexp.config` / `molexp.profile` / `molexp.git` — **Layer 0 (cross-layer primitives)**. Citable from any layer; MUST NOT import any `molexp` layer at module load (workspace types only inside functions / under `TYPE_CHECKING`).
- `molexp.workspace` — **Layer 1 (workspace)**, bottom of the DAG. Pure storage. Owns `Folder` + the `FileSystem` Protocol + three implementations, assets, hierarchy, atomic JSON, the singleton `CacheFolder` (`ws.cache`), the `AssetCatalog` (`ws.catalog`), and the decomposed `RunContext`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow` / `agent` / `harness` / `plugins` / `server` / `cli` / `pydantic_ai` / `pydantic_graph`.
- `molexp.workflow` — **Layer 2 (workflow)**. Graph engine. Uses `molexp.workspace` only. **MUST NOT import** `agent` / `harness` / `pydantic_ai`. May import `pydantic_graph` only under `_pydantic_graph/`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` — **Layer 2 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_graph` site.
- `molexp.agent` — **Layer 3 (agent — pydantic-ai facade)**. Sibling of workflow above workspace. Owns LLM primitives + `ChatLoop` + `InteractiveLoop`; pipeline orchestration lives in harness. Uses workspace only. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow` or `molexp.harness`. May import `pydantic_ai` only under `_pydanticai/`; never imports `pydantic_graph`; `import molexp.agent` loads neither SDK.
- `molexp.agent.loops` — **Layer 3 / loops**. Two loops: `ChatLoop` (one round-trip) and emergent `InteractiveLoop` (drives `Router.stream_agentic`).
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` — **Layer 3 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_ai` site.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` / `molexp.agent.persistence` — **Layer 3 / agent subsystems**. MCP config layer + generic three-tier resource store.
- `molexp.harness` — **Layer 4 (experiment orchestrator — top of the DAG)**. Sits above agent/workflow/workspace; composes all three (sole agent edge: `agent.router.Router` via `RouterBackedAgentGateway`). Owns the `Mode` ledger + `PlanMode` (9 stages) / `RunMode` (10 stages), `Stage` + `StageRunner`, `ArtifactStore` / `EventLog` / `ArtifactLineageStore`, `CapabilityRegistry`, executors, validators, prompts, `ApprovalGate`, audit + replay. **MUST NOT be imported by** workspace / workflow / agent / plugins / server / cli. Enforced by `tests/test_harness/test_import_guard.py`; the agent-side guard forbids `molexp.harness` (and `molexp.workflow`) under `agent/`.
- `molexp.server` — **Layer 5 (application shell — FastAPI app)**. On top of agent + workflow + workspace. Route-domain split + schemas + decomposed `deps/` + server-side `agent_runtime/`. `operator_config.py` bridges the operator config into `molexp.config` (CLI and server share one loader).
- `molexp.cli` — **Layer 6 (application shell — Typer CLI)**. Flat command tree built on `cli/_app.py`. Top-level `init` / `agent` / `plan` + workspace verbs + typer groups (`project` / `experiment` / `runs` / `asset` / `target` / `mcp` / `session` / `config`). Discovers third-party CLI plugins via `molexp.cli_plugins`.
- `molexp.plugins` — **Layer 7 (registered plugin packages)**. Registry of optional capabilities (`GH`). `molexp.plugins.tensorboard` is the optional-extra plugin (`pip install molexp[tensorboard]`).
- `ui/src` — **Layer 8 (frontend)**. React 19 SPA, downstream of `molexp.server`'s auto-generated OpenAPI client; bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` and shipped in the wheel.

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
